# CSCE-548-Project
This project is a basic N-tier application that creates and manages speedrun records. The database tracks Authors, Games, and Runs, where each run is related to a single author and game. Each author and game can be related to multiple runs.

This project consisted of two phases:
* The first phase consisted of designing and implementing the app using code generated by ChatGPT (AI usage was a requirement for the coding portion of this project), and intervening when necessary. Security was not a concern during this phase of the project.
* The second phase focused on cleaning up the code written by ChatGPT using concepts and techniques learned it class. It consisted of fixing security vulnerabilities and improving implementations when necessary.

This project was built using MySQL and Java (planning on migrating to Spring, change this if possible).
